violations.text: Roast beef was observed held at 76 degrees Fahrenheit on the prep unit cutting board. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, roast beef had been out for about 35 minutes. Roast beef was relocated to the prep unit to cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Establishment is using time as a public health control to leave roast beef on slicer throughout the day. An application and time logs were given to the person in charge at time of inspection. Establishment must submit application to use time as a public health control by 2pm tomorrow. Time logs must be sent to inspector daily until further notice. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. Ice machine must be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The floor and wall at the fry station have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Establishment is using time as a public health control to leave roast beef on slicer throughout the day. Establishment must record the time on a time log. Per person in charge, roast beef does not stay out longer than 1 hour. Time logs were given to the person in charge at time of inspection. Establishment must submit procedures for approval to use time as a public health control. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. Ice machine must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The floor and wall at the fry station have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The floors in the mop sink and dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
